reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title, and report it as "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface showing "Your Agents" sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260616-171642-gfku" agent in the sidebar - Agent view opened with chat interface ready for messaging
Clicked on the message input textbox - Textbox became active and ready for input
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message appeared correctly in the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" was created
Waited for agent response with 3-minute timeout - Response completed in approximately 19 seconds when the "Working..." indicator disappeared

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - The agent's response explicitly states: "The page title is 'Example Domain'" and confirms "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully and its title is 'Example Domain'"
Took final screenshot showing complete response - Screenshot captured showing the full chat interaction with the agent's successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
